reason: Unlocking Chain-of-Thought (pe_cot) will improve my reasoning and accuracy for future questions, which is essential for higher-level doors.
Unlocking pe_plan will provide a structured planning phase and a reflection step for future questions, significantly increasing accuracy and ensuring I reach the next SP threshold safely.

I have 1 Skill Point available. Unlocking 'pe_reflect' (Reflection++) is a high-priority strategic move because it provides a second dedicated LLM call to review and correct my answer, significantly reducing the risk of losing HP and increasing the likelihood of gaining XP, especially for higher-level questions.
